description: Tenant/client/query offender analytics from proxy logs stored in VictoriaLogs; keeps visibility even if Loki-compatible paths are degraded.

targets.expr: ${filter:raw} (loki.tenant.id:${tenant:raw} or tenant:${tenant:raw} or __tenant_id__:${tenant:raw}) (loki.client.source:${client:raw} or enduser.id:${client:raw} or client.address:${client:raw} or client:${client:raw}) (k8s.cluster.name:${cluster:raw} or cluster:${cluster:raw}) (deployment.environment.name:${env:raw} or deployment.environment:${env:raw} or env:${env:raw}) | stats by (loki.tenant.id, tenant, __tenant_id__) count() as hits | sort by (hits desc) limit 20

${filter:raw} (loki.tenant.id:${tenant:raw} or tenant:${tenant:raw} or __tenant_id__:${tenant:raw}) (loki.client.source:${client:raw} or enduser.id:${client:raw} or client.address:${client:raw} or client:${client:raw}) (k8s.cluster.name:${cluster:raw} or cluster:${cluster:raw}) (deployment.environment.name:${env:raw} or deployment.environment:${env:raw} or env:${env:raw}) | stats by (loki.client.source, enduser.id, client.address, client) count() as hits | sort by (hits desc) limit 20

${filter:raw} (loki.tenant.id:${tenant:raw} or tenant:${tenant:raw} or __tenant_id__:${tenant:raw}) (loki.client.source:${client:raw} or enduser.id:${client:raw} or client.address:${client:raw} or client:${client:raw}) (k8s.cluster.name:${cluster:raw} or cluster:${cluster:raw}) (deployment.environment.name:${env:raw} or deployment.environment:${env:raw} or env:${env:raw}) | filter http.response.status_code:in(400,401,403,404,429,500,502,503,504) | stats by (loki.client.source, enduser.id, client.address, client, http.route, http.response.status_code) count() as hits | sort by (hits desc) limit 20

${filter:raw} (loki.tenant.id:${tenant:raw} or tenant:${tenant:raw} or __tenant_id__:${tenant:raw}) (loki.client.source:${client:raw} or enduser.id:${client:raw} or client.address:${client:raw} or client:${client:raw}) (k8s.cluster.name:${cluster:raw} or cluster:${cluster:raw}) (deployment.environment.name:${env:raw} or deployment.environment:${env:raw} or env:${env:raw}) | stats by (http.route) avg(event.duration_ms) as avg_ms, max(event.duration_ms) as max_ms, count() as hits | sort by (max_ms desc) limit 30

${filter:raw} (loki.tenant.id:${tenant:raw} or tenant:${tenant:raw} or __tenant_id__:${tenant:raw}) (loki.client.source:${client:raw} or enduser.id:${client:raw} or client.address:${client:raw} or client:${client:raw}) (k8s.cluster.name:${cluster:raw} or cluster:${cluster:raw}) (deployment.environment.name:${env:raw} or deployment.environment:${env:raw} or env:${env:raw}) | stats by (_time:1m, loki.tenant.id, tenant, __tenant_id__) count() as hits

${filter:raw} (loki.tenant.id:${tenant:raw} or tenant:${tenant:raw} or __tenant_id__:${tenant:raw}) (loki.client.source:${client:raw} or enduser.id:${client:raw} or client.address:${client:raw} or client:${client:raw}) (k8s.cluster.name:${cluster:raw} or cluster:${cluster:raw}) (deployment.environment.name:${env:raw} or deployment.environment:${env:raw} or env:${env:raw}) | filter http.response.status_code:in(400,401,403,404,429,500,502,503,504) | stats by (_time:1m, http.response.status_code) count() as errors

${filter:raw} (loki.tenant.id:${tenant:raw} or tenant:${tenant:raw} or __tenant_id__:${tenant:raw}) (loki.client.source:${client:raw} or enduser.id:${client:raw} or client.address:${client:raw} or client:${client:raw}) (k8s.cluster.name:${cluster:raw} or cluster:${cluster:raw}) (deployment.environment.name:${env:raw} or deployment.environment:${env:raw} or env:${env:raw}) | sort by (_time desc) limit 300

list.name: filter
list.label: LogsQL Filter
list.description: Base filter applied to every panel. Default targets proxy structured logs in VictoriaLogs.

list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant
list.description: Tenant filter; matches `loki.tenant.id`, `tenant`, or `__tenant_id__` (`*` means all).

list.name: client
list.label: Client
list.description: Client filter; matches `loki.client.source`, `enduser.id`, `client.address`, or `client` (`*` means all).

list.name: cluster
list.label: Cluster
list.description: Cluster filter; matches either `k8s.cluster.name` or `cluster` (`*` means all).

list.name: env
list.label: Environment
list.description: Environment filter; matches `deployment.environment.name`, `deployment.environment`, or `env` (`*` means all).

title: Loki-VL-proxy Offenders (VictoriaLogs Native)
